ground_truth: Samosa is high in calories and fat due to deep frying. It is not considered healthy for daily consumption. Healthy swap: Try baked samosas or use whole wheat flour.
Idli is a healthy, steamed fermented food. It is low in calories, easy to digest, and a good source of carbohydrates and protein. It is a great breakfast option.
Jalebi is unhealthy because it is deep-fried and soaked in sugar syrup. It has very high sugar content and empty calories. Healthy swap: Eat in moderation or try low-sugar versions.
Chana Masala is healthy as it is rich in protein and fiber from chickpeas. However, restaurant versions may have high oil. Healthy swap: Cook with less oil and minimal cream.
Butter Chicken is typically high in calories and saturated fat due to butter and cream. It is better as an occasional treat. Healthy swap: Use yogurt instead of cream and reduce butter.
